name: neo
description: Multi-agent semantic reasoning system with persistent memory for code suggestions, architectural guidance, and optimization recommendations

interface.longDescription: Neo is a read-only reasoning helper that suggests solutions via multi-agent reasoning (MapCoder/CodeSim style) over a persistent semantic memory of your codebase. Skills wrap the local `neo` CLI to give Codex one-shot access to its plan/simulate/code pipeline. Requires the neo CLI installed locally (`pip install neo-reasoner[openai]`).
